sessions.title: Initial Setup
sessions.summary: Project setup with CesiumJS + Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles. Cinematic flythrough, 8 landmark billboards, dark/gold branding overlay.
details: CesiumJS 1.119 viewer with Google 3D Tiles (real Macau photogrammetry)
5-stage cinematic flythrough sequence
8 landmark billboards with Chinese/English names
Dark/gold branding overlay with Cinzel + Noto Sans SC fonts
Loading screen with progress bar

sessions.title: Real-Time Day/Night Cycle
sessions.summary: Sun/moon position driven by actual Macau time (UTC+8). Dynamic lighting changes throughout the day.
details: CesiumJS clock synced to real UTC+8 Macau time
Sun and moon position driven by actual date/time
Real-time clock display with day/night/golden hour indicator
Sky atmosphere rendering

sessions.title: Live Weather System
sessions.summary: Real-time Macau weather via Open-Meteo API with rain overlay, fog effects, and cloud-based light dimming.
details: Open-Meteo API integration (free, no key, CORS-friendly)
Weather UI: temperature, conditions, humidity, wind, cloud cover
CSS rain overlay with 3 intensities based on WMO weather codes
CesiumJS fog for fog/rime/heavy overcast conditions
Sun light dimming proportional to cloud cover
Auto-refresh every 15 minutes

sessions.title: Animated Ferry Boats
sessions.summary: 5 ferries on 2 routes crossing Macau's harbor with smooth ping-pong animation and gold-themed boat icons.
details: 5 ferries on 2 routes (Outer Harbour-Taipa, Inner Harbour-Taipa)
CesiumJS CallbackProperty for per-frame position updates
Ping-pong animation with staggered phase offsets
Gold-themed canvas-drawn boat billboard icons
Scale/translucency by distance
Real Macau terminal coordinates

sessions.title: Neon Casino Glow
sessions.summary: 11 glow zones across casino districts with CesiumJS bloom post-processing, activated at night with smooth dusk/dawn transitions.
details: CesiumJS bloom post-processing for neon glow effect
11 glow zones: Cotai Strip, Peninsula, waterfront
Canvas radial gradient billboards as light sources
Time-of-day modulation: full glow 19:00-05:00, ramp at dusk/dawn
Color-coded: gold (casinos), purple (City of Dreams), amber (waterfront)
High-altitude secondary glow for major casinos (visible from bird's eye)
UI indicator showing glow percentage during active hours

sessions.title: Animated Road Traffic
sessions.summary: 19 vehicles on 5 routes across Macau's 3 bridges, Cotai Strip, and peninsula roads with smooth animated movement.
details: 5 traffic routes: Ponte de Amizade, Ponte de Sai Van, Ponte Gov. Nobre de Carvalho, Cotai Strip Boulevard, Avenida da Praia Grande
19 total vehicles with staggered offsets and alternating directions
Reuses ferry ping-pong CallbackProperty pattern for per-frame updates
Canvas radial gradient car icons (12px glowing dots) visible at road level
Scale/translucency by distance for clean appearance at all zoom levels
Bridge Traffic entry in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Airport Approach & Departure Flights
sessions.summary: 4 planes on 2 flight paths (approach from south, departure north) with altitude-interpolated animation over Macau International Airport.
details: 2 flight routes: approach descending from 450m to 15m, departure climbing 15m to 700m
4 total planes with staggered offsets and one-way looping (not ping-pong)
Real MFM runway 16/34 coordinates on Taipa reclaimed land
Altitude-interpolated lerp function for 3D flight paths
20px white-gold glow billboard with bright core for visibility at distance
Airport Flights entry in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Ambient Audio Soundscape
sessions.summary: Procedural 3-layer ambient soundscape using Web Audio API with time-of-day and weather-reactive mixing.
details: 3 sound layers: ocean waves (LFO-modulated filtered noise), wind (bandpass with gusts), city hum (60/120Hz + shimmer)
Time-of-day variation: louder city during day, more ocean at night
Weather-reactive: wind volume scales with real wind speed, rain boosts noise
Smooth 2-second gain ramps for seamless transitions
Mute/unmute toggle button (starts muted, respects browser autoplay policy)
No external audio files — fully procedural via Web Audio API

sessions.title: Landmark Info Cards
sessions.summary: Click any landmark to see a rich info popup with description, historical facts, type, and year.
details: 8 landmarks enriched with descriptions, facts, type (Casino/Temple/Heritage), and year
Dark/gold themed info card with emoji, name, Chinese name, meta tags, description, and bulleted facts
Triggered from both 3D billboard clicks and Explore panel selections
Dismiss via close button, backdrop click, or Escape key
Smooth CSS transitions: card slides up with backdrop fade

sessions.title: Interactive Baccarat Table
sessions.summary: Click any casino landmark to play baccarat with proper Punto Banco rules, animated card dealing, and session stats.
details: Enter Casino button on casino/resort landmark info cards (6 casinos)
Full baccarat game overlay with green felt table and gold accents
Proper Punto Banco rules: 8-deck shoe, naturals, third-card drawing rules
Animated card dealing: face-down sequence, reveal, third card, result
Player (blue) vs Banker (red) color coding following casino convention
Session win/loss stats tracking (Player/Banker/Tie counts)

sessions.title: Harbor Fireworks at Night
sessions.summary: Particle-based firework display over the harbor during night hours (20:00-01:00) with rockets, bursts, and brand-matching color palettes.
details: Canvas 2D particle system with rockets launching from bottom of screen
3 burst types: spherical, ring, and willow (trailing) with gravity and sparkle
6 color palettes: gold, red, purple, gold+red, amber, gold+purple
Active 20:00-01:00 Macau time with periodic launches every 4-10 seconds
Occasional rapid multi-rocket salvos for dramatic effect
Full particle physics: gravity, air resistance, fade, twinkle

sessions.title: Animated Pedestrians
sessions.summary: ~26 walking pedestrians near 6 popular areas of Macau, visible at street level with warm-toned glowing dots.
details: 6 pedestrian zones: Senado Square, Ruins of St. Paul's, Grand Lisboa, Cotai Strip, A-Ma Temple, Macau Tower
~26 pedestrian entities with random phase offsets and variable walking speeds
8px warm-toned radial gradient billboard icons at 2m altitude (street level)
Only visible when zoomed in (translucencyByDistance fades at 4km)
Reuses proven CallbackProperty ping-pong animation pattern
Multiple short paths per zone for natural strolling behavior

sessions.title: Animated Construction Cranes
sessions.summary: 5 construction crane sites with static tower billboards and orbiting warning lights at active development areas across Macau.
details: 5 crane sites: Zone A New Town, Cotai East, Studio City Phase 2, Taipa Waterfront, Peninsula Inner Harbour
Canvas-drawn crane tower billboards with lattice cross-brace structure and red warning light
Orbiting warning light entities circling each crane top using CallbackProperty with cos/sin animation
Variable rotation speeds (42-55 seconds per revolution) and arm radii for natural variation
Development section added to Explore panel with 3 clickable sites and live badges
Fulfills Prime Directive: construction cranes move

sessions.title: Harbor Water Shimmer
sessions.summary: Animated light reflection points on water surfaces around Macau's harbor, with subtle day sparkle and bright night casino reflections.
details: ~23 shimmer points across Inner Harbour, Outer Harbour, Nam Van Lake, bridge area, Cotai waterfront, Taipa, Coloane
Canvas radial gradient billboard icons (10px) at water level (2m altitude)
Sine-wave animated scale via CallbackProperty with random phase and speed per point
Day/night intensity tied to neon glow system: 30% during day (sun sparkle), 100% at night (casino reflections)
Visible when zoomed in (translucencyByDistance fades at 10km)

sessions.title: Casino Sky Beams
sessions.summary: Vertical light beams shooting up from 5 major casinos at night with gentle sway animation.
details: 5 casino sky beams: Grand Lisboa, Venetian, Galaxy, Wynn Palace, City of Dreams
Canvas-drawn tapered beam billboards with bright core gradient
Gentle sway animation via CallbackProperty (oscillating position)
Visibility tied to neon glow intensity — appears at dusk, disappears at dawn
Height range 280-400m for dramatic skyline effect

sessions.title: Wynn Performance Lake Fountain Show
sessions.summary: Choreographed fountain jet animation at Wynn Palace with 13 jets, color-changing lights, and timed 3-minute shows.
details: 13 fountain jets: 12 in semicircular arc + 1 tall center feature jet (up to 90m)
Choreographed height patterns with crescendo/diminuendo envelope, wave, and pulse modulation
3-minute shows with 15-minute pauses, active at night (tied to neon glow system)
6 color palettes cycling per show: cool white-blue, gold, red, blue, warm amber, purple
5 mist/spray entities at fountain base with animated scale for atmospheric depth
Shows section added to Explore panel with Wynn Performance Lake entry

sessions.title: Guia Circuit Race Cars
sessions.summary: 5 animated F3 race cars racing the iconic Guia Circuit street course around the Macau Peninsula.
details: 15 waypoints tracing the real 6.2km Guia Circuit (Start/Finish, Mandarin Bend, San Francisco Hill, Guia Fortress, Lisboa Bend, Melco Hairpin, R Bend)
5 race cars with distinct colors (red, blue, yellow, green, orange) and bright white-core icons (16px)
One-way looping animation — cars continuously lap the circuit like real F3 race cars
Higher speed than regular traffic (18s per lap) with evenly staggered phase offsets
Racing section added to Explore panel with Guia Circuit entry and live badge

sessions.title: Traditional Junk Boats
sessions.summary: 4 traditional red-sailed Chinese junk boats cruising the Inner and Outer Harbours of Macau.
details: 3 harbour routes: Inner Harbour, Outer Harbour, and A-Ma Temple coastline
Distinctive 32px canvas icon with red batten sails, wooden hull, and dual sails
4 junk boats with slow, stately movement (85-100s per route) — much slower than modern ferries
Ping-pong animation with staggered phases for natural movement
Heritage Junks entry added to On the Water section in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Geographic District Labels
sessions.summary: Floating bilingual district labels over 8 areas of Macau, visible from bird's-eye view for geographic orientation.
details: 8 district labels: Macau Peninsula, Taipa, Cotai Strip, Coloane, Inner Harbour, Outer Harbour, Nam Van Lake, Airport
Canvas-rendered billboard icons with bold gold English name, decorative line, and Chinese subtitle
Visible from overview level (translucencyByDistance: invisible below 600m, fully visible above 2500m)
Opposite visibility to pedestrians/shimmer — helps visitors understand Macau geography from above
Addresses Session 22 observation about needing overview-level features

sessions.title: Guia Lighthouse Rotating Beam
sessions.summary: Animated lighthouse beam sweeping from Guia Hill summit — the oldest lighthouse on the China coast (1865), a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
details: Static lighthouse tower billboard at Guia Hill summit (108m) with white tower, red dome, and lantern room glow
Rotating beam billboard sweeping 360 degrees via CallbackProperty (8-second rotation period)
Horizontal tapered beam icon (256x16px canvas) with bright-to-transparent gradient
Night-only visibility tied to neon glow system (appears at dusk, disappears at dawn)
Heritage section added to Explore panel with Guia Lighthouse entry and live badge

sessions.title: Macau LRT Light Rail Trains
sessions.summary: 3 animated light rail trains running the real Macau LRT Taipa Line route through Cotai, connecting Galaxy to Airport and Taipa Ferry Terminal.
details: Route follows the actual Macau LRT Taipa Line: Ocean (Galaxy) to Lotus to East Asian Games to Cotai East to Pai Kok to Airport to Taipa Ferry Terminal
3 green-themed train entities with distinctive canvas icons (windows, headlight, glow halo)
One-way loop animation at 15m altitude (elevated viaduct) with 2-minute circuit time
Transit section added to Explore panel with Macau LRT entry and live badge
8th entity animation system using proven CallbackProperty pattern

sessions.title: Bridge Night Illumination
sessions.summary: Decorative LED-style light points along Macau's 3 iconic bridges, glowing at night with distinct colors per bridge.
details: 50 light points across 3 bridges: Ponte de Amizade (18, cool blue-white), Ponte de Sai Van (16, warm gold), Ponte Gov. Nobre de Carvalho (16, neutral white)
Night-only visibility tied to neon glow system with automatic dusk/dawn fade
Gentle pulse animation via CallbackProperty with sequential phase offsets for running light effect
Bridges section added to Explore panel with 3 entries, bilingual names, and live badges
Bridge deck altitude (12m) fits natural layering between water (2-3m) and LRT viaduct (15m)

sessions.title: Time-of-Day Slider
sessions.summary: Interactive time slider lets users preview any hour of the day, showcasing night-only features like neon glow, fireworks, bridge lights, and lighthouse beam.
details: Range slider (0-24h in 15-min steps) in bottom-right clock area with gold theme
Overrides getMacauHour() for all time-gated features (neon, fireworks, bridge lights, lighthouse, fountain shows)
Updates CesiumJS viewer clock for accurate sun/moon position and scene lighting
LIVE button returns to real Macau time and resumes clock animation
Clock label switches to 'Preview' mode when time override is active

sessions.title: Floating Sky Lanterns
sessions.summary: 12 traditional kongming lanterns floating over the Inner Harbour at night, slowly ascending with warm golden glow and flicker.
details: 12 sky lantern entities over Inner Harbour / Nam Van Lake area, ascending 30m to 220m
Canvas-drawn 28px lantern icon with warm orange paper balloon shape, inner flame glow, and outer halo
Quadratic ease-out ascent animation with gentle horizontal drift and wobble per lantern
Night-only visibility tied to neon glow system with fade-in at launch and fade-out at peak
Sky Lanterns entry added to Heritage section in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Helicopter Service
sessions.summary: 3 helicopters operating from the Outer Harbour heliport: 2 HK shuttle flights and 1 scenic peninsula tour at 200-350m altitude.
details: 3 helicopter entities on 3 routes: HK Shuttle Outbound, HK Shuttle Inbound, Scenic Peninsula Tour
Real Outer Harbour Terminal heliport coordinates for the Macau-Hong Kong shuttle service
Canvas-drawn 24px helicopter icon with fuselage, cockpit, main rotor disc, tail boom, and position lights
One-way loop animation using proven lerpPositionWithAlt and CallbackProperty pattern
Helicopter Service entry added to Transit section in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Auto-Tour Mode
sessions.summary: TOUR button that automatically flies the camera through all attractions with smooth transitions and location labels.
details: Tour button appears alongside Replay Flythrough after initial cinematic ends
Visits all 30+ attractions in randomized order with 4-second camera flights and 6-second dwell time
Bilingual location label (English + Chinese) shown during each stop
Stops automatically on user interaction (drag, zoom, right-click) or button press
Button toggles between Tour/Stop Tour with active gold highlight state

sessions.title: Dragon Boat Racing
sessions.summary: 5 colorful dragon boats racing parallel lanes on Nam Van Lake, bringing life to a previously underutilized area.
details: 5 dragon boat lanes across Nam Van Lake with team colors: red, blue, green, gold, purple
Canvas-drawn 36x20px dragon boat icons with dragon head, tail, team stripe, and 6 paddler dots
Varied race durations (22-26s) create natural overtaking between boats
Ping-pong animation using proven CallbackProperty pattern at water level (3m altitude)
Dragon Boat Racing entry added to On the Water section in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Venetian Canal Gondolas
sessions.summary: 3 traditional gondolas gliding along canals near The Venetian Macao, recreating the iconic gondola ride experience.
details: 3 gondola entities on canal routes around The Venetian's outdoor lagoon area
Canvas-drawn 28x16px gondola icon with black hull, gold ferro prow, red-shirted gondolier with oar, and seated passenger
Slow stately ping-pong animation (65-75s per route) matching real gondola pace
Staggered phase offsets for natural spacing between gondolas
Venetian Gondolas entry added to Shows section in Explore panel with live badge

sessions.title: Red Lantern Strings
sessions.summary: 10 traditional red Chinese lantern strings hanging across streets in 4 historic areas of Macau.
details: 10 lantern string billboards across Senado Square, Ruins of St. Paul's, A-Ma Temple, and Taipa Village
Canvas-drawn 64x32px icons with 5-6 red lanterns on catenary wire, gold ribs and tassels, warm inner glow
Gentle wind sway animation via CallbackProperty scale oscillation with random phase per string
Night brightness boost tied to neon glow intensity — lanterns glow brighter after dark
Red Lanterns entry added to Heritage section of Explore panel

sessions.title: Macau Tower SkyJump
sessions.summary: 2 animated bungy jumpers leaping from Macau Tower's 233m observation deck with multi-bounce physics.
details: Bungy physics simulation: free fall, 3 damped bounces (70%, 40%, 15% rebound), winch-back up to deck
12-second jump cycle + 8-second pause, 2 staggered jumpers for continuous action
Canvas-drawn 16x24px jumper icon with bright yellow-gold glow and bungy cord line
Fade-in/fade-out transitions prevent visual pop on jump start and winch-back reset
Tower SkyJump entry added to Shows section of Explore panel

sessions.title: Cotai Strip LED Facades
sessions.summary: 5 animated color-cycling LED screen displays on major Cotai Strip casino buildings, visible at night.
details: LED grid pattern (12x6 cells) on 96x48px canvas with hue-shifting color waves across columns and time
5 Cotai casinos: Venetian, Galaxy, City of Dreams, MGM Cotai, Studio City
Night-only visibility tied to neon glow system with smooth dusk/dawn transitions
Color cycling updates every 500ms for smooth animation without per-frame canvas overhead
Cotai LED Facades entry added to Shows section of Explore panel

sessions.title: Harbor Seagulls
sessions.summary: 18 animated seagulls circling in 4 flocks over Macau's coastal areas, adding life to the sky between ground and aircraft altitude.
details: 4 flock centers: Inner Harbour, Outer Harbour, Nam Van Lake, Taipa waterfront (4-5 birds each)
Canvas-drawn 20x12px white seagull silhouette with M-shaped wings spread
Circular orbiting animation via CallbackProperty with figure-eight wobble overlay and vertical bob
Billboard rotation follows flight direction for natural appearance
Wildlife section added to Explore panel with Harbor Seagulls entry and live badge

sessions.title: Casino Rooftop Searchlights
sessions.summary: 6 sweeping searchlight beams from casino rooftops at night, creating a premiere-night atmosphere across the Cotai Strip and peninsula.
details: 6 casinos: Grand Lisboa, Venetian, Galaxy, Wynn Palace, MGM Cotai, Studio City with distinct beam colors
Sweeping arc animation — beams oscillate back and forth (not full rotation) for dramatic effect
Canvas-drawn 320x20px tapered beam icon with bright core at source fading to transparent tip
Night-only visibility tied to neon glow system with smooth dusk/dawn transitions
Casino Searchlights entry added to Shows section of Explore panel

sessions.title: Galaxy Macau Rooftop Wave Pool
sessions.summary: 7 animated wave pool entities on Galaxy Macau's rooftop, simulating the world's largest rooftop wave pool with turquoise water and animated wave crests.
details: 7 wave pool billboard entities across Galaxy Macau's Grand Resort Deck rooftop at 55m altitude
Canvas-drawn 64x32px elliptical pool icon with turquoise gradient water, animated white wave crests, and sparkle highlights
Wave animation updates every 400ms with shifting crest positions and sparkle movement
Gentle scale pulse via CallbackProperty simulates wave swells
Galaxy Wave Pool entry added to Shows section of Explore panel
Always active (not night-only) — fills the gap where ~60% of features are night-only

sessions.title: A-Ma Temple Incense Coils
sessions.summary: 6 hanging spiral incense coils at A-Ma Temple with rising smoke wisps, adding cultural authenticity to Macau's oldest temple.
details: 6 incense coil billboard entities across A-Ma Temple courtyards at 10-15m altitude
Canvas-drawn 32x40px spiral coil icon with brown rings, red prayer tag, amber ember glow
6 rising smoke wisp entities with ascending animation (20-35s rise cycle) and horizontal drift
Smoke wisps fade in at launch and expand/fade at peak, recycling continuously
Canvas smoke icons regenerated every 500ms for drift animation
Temple Incense entry added to Heritage section of Explore panel with live badge
Always active (daytime feature) — adds to the minority of non-night-only content

sessions.title: Camera Position URL Sharing
sessions.summary: Share View button copies a URL with camera position, and visiting shared URLs skips flythrough to go directly to the shared view.
details: Share View button added alongside Replay and Tour at bottom center
URL hash encodes camera lon/lat/alt/heading/pitch (e.g. #v=113.55,22.17,1600,211,-30)
Camera movement updates URL hash in real-time (debounced 500ms)
Clicking Share View copies the full URL to clipboard with toast notification
Visiting a shared URL skips the flythrough and flies directly to the shared camera position
Sanity checks on URL parameters prevent invalid/out-of-range camera positions
First UX/interactivity feature since auto-tour (Session 34)

sessions.title: Minimap Navigation
sessions.summary: Canvas-drawn minimap in bottom-left showing Macau coastline, landmarks, camera position with heading indicator, and click-to-fly navigation.
details: 160x180px minimap overlay in bottom-left corner with dark/gold theme
Simplified Macau coastline outlines (Peninsula, Taipa/Cotai, Coloane) drawn on canvas
Three bridge lines connecting Peninsula to Taipa
Gold dots for all 8 landmark positions
Camera position shown as bright gold dot with heading direction line and FOV cone
Click anywhere on minimap to fly camera to that location
Updates every 500ms to track camera movement in real-time
Hidden during flythrough, visible after completion

sessions.title: Explore Panel Search
sessions.summary: Search box in Explore panel filters all 30+ attractions in real-time by name (English or Chinese), auto-expanding matched sections.
details: Search input with placeholder and clear button at top of Explore panel
Real-time filtering on input — matches against attraction name and Chinese text
Sections with no matches are hidden; sections with matches auto-expand
Clear button resets filter and refocuses input
Mobile-responsive styling for 390px+ viewports
Gold-themed input styling consistent with panel design

sessions.title: Keyboard Shortcuts + Help Overlay
sessions.summary: Full keyboard shortcut system with ? help overlay: 1-8 fly to landmarks, N/D/L for time control, T/E/F/S/M for features.
details: Press ? to toggle styled help overlay showing all keyboard shortcuts
Keys 1-8 fly directly to each landmark with info card popup
N = night preview (22:00), D = day preview (12:00), L = return to live time
T = toggle auto-tour, E = toggle explore panel, F = replay flythrough
S = share current view, M = toggle sound
Input-aware: shortcuts disabled when typing in search or other inputs
Dark/gold themed help card matching site design, mobile-responsive
